title: Foreign geometry import (STEP/IGES → B-rep body in .SLDPRT)
roi: audit gap #1 (FR-1-07) — bridge EXPORTS but could not IMPORT; this closes the round-trip
scope_v1: Import STEP/IGES → .SLDPRT with real B-rep bodies. NO feature-tree reconstruction, NO healing, NO re-parameterization. Dumb-solid deliverable.

com_recipe.load_file_4_signature: LoadFile4(FileName: BSTR, ArgString: BSTR, ImportData: IDispatch, ByRef Errors: I4) -> ModelDoc2
com_recipe.get_import_file_data_signature: GetImportFileData(FileName: BSTR) -> IDispatch (kernel dispatches by extension)
com_recipe.arg_string: "r" — forces standard native B-rep import, no 3D Interconnect, no imported-feature tree (matches v1 dumb-solid deliverable)
com_recipe.early_bind_path: typed(sw, 'ISldWorks').LoadFile4(path, 'r', import_data, 0) — ByRef I4 marshals through makepy as the second tuple element
verify_the_effect: pdoc.GetBodies2(0, True) — swSolidBody=0, True=all — require ≥1 body (rejects E4 bodyless-Reference-feature trap)
doc.Extension.CreateMassProperty().Volume (m³) × 1e9 → mm³, assert within verify.volume_rel_tol of verify.volume_mm3
com_recipe.save: doc.SaveAs3(path, 0, 0) — W34 proven path, NOT Save3; three-postcondition verification (rc=0, file exists, non-zero size)

fail_closed.volume_mismatch: result.errors includes 'volume ... mm³ outside ±1.00% of expected ... mm³'
